text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
119 
GAP_INP_COINS_OS 
LABEL: 
Gap In-Network Pharmacy Coinsurance for other days’ supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a day’s supply of the drugs (other 
than 1- or 3-months) on this tier, using an in-network pharmacy during the coverage gap phase of the 
Part D benefit. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: GAP_INP_COINS_OS 
TYPE: 
NUM
